name: autoresearch
description: Karpathy-style autonomous LLM research loop adapted for real ML codebases (editable-install Python projects, accelerate/torchrun launchers, wandb metrics). Ships two skills — setup and run — plus an `ar` helper CLI that owns launch orchestration, metric extraction, atomic checkpoint commit, and chain-mode transitions so the main Claude session stays context-light across hundreds or thousands of iterations. v0.2.0 adds argparse-CLI wrapper mode for scripts with `if __name__ == "__main__"` entry points, project introspection in setup (entry module / CLI args / wandb project / distributed framework / resume flag detection), and a venv preflight phase before project analysis.
